MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: EX PARTE APPLICATION RE: EARLY EVALUATION CONFERENCE AND STAY OF PROCEDINGS PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 2699.3(F) ET SEQ.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications.

Continued to be heard in department 304 before Judge Schulman on September 3, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. The deadline for defendants to file a responsive pleading is extended through September 3, 2025 to preserve Defendant's timely request for an Early Evaluation Conference.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
